data.body: Reconciled epic 7c02 with its 5 children after the plan-review refinements (bidirectional). Epic gained ACs/constraints for dir-shape validation, write+sync init round-trip, reads.py work-tree-gate preservation, and the fsck mismatch mechanism — each mapped to an owning child (14b8/5436/8f43). Child 14b8 took ownership of the epic's orphan/no-auto-migrate documentation AC + README/architecture docs + validator unit tests. Resolved the c1/c5 validator-unit-test overlap: 14b8 owns config-level validator unit tests, 5436 owns init/e2e/regression/fsck and defers. All 6 tickets re-pass check-ac + clarity.
